articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: U.S. bombs Iranian military sites and Kuwait is hit by drone and missile fire - NPR
articles.description: The U.S. military says it bombed Iranian radar and drone control sites in Iran after Tehran shot down an American MQ-1 Predator drone this weekend. Kuwait said its air defenses opened fire on Monday.
articles.content: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates The United States bombed Iranian radar and drone control sites in Iran after Tehran shot down an American MQ-1 Predator drone this weekend, the American military said Mond… [+3469 chars]

articles.title: De La Espriella Takes Surprise Early Lead in Colombia Vote - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Celebrity lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella unexpectedly topped the first round of Colombia’s presidential vote, as Latin America heads into another highly polarized election.
